title: Daily Generation Output
description: Full generated content package produced by modules 02–07 and validated by module 08. Passed to module 09 (Publish to GitHub) and module 10 (Update D1 State).

publish_job_id.description: D1 ID of the publish_jobs row tracking this run.

alert_count.description: Total alert count for this topic/date, carried from the aggregate context.

cluster_count.description: Total cluster count for this topic/date, carried from the aggregate context.

summary.description: Structured daily summary output. Matches the daily_summary AI schema.

article_md.description: Full written article in Markdown format. Minimum 200 characters.

expectation_check.description: Expectation check output. Matches the expectation_check AI schema.

tomorrow_outlook.description: Tomorrow's outlook output. Matches the tomorrow_outlook AI schema.

video_script.description: Video script output. Matches the video_script AI schema.

youtube_metadata.description: YouTube metadata output. Matches the youtube_metadata AI schema.

validated.description: Set to true by module 08 after all outputs pass validation. Must be true before module 09 runs.

github_commit_sha.description: SHA of the GitHub commit written by module 09. Populated after successful GitHub publish. Null before publishing.
